variants: Egzona Berisha was born in Stoneknoll Commons and has since made a name for herself in the literary world. She currently resides in Lilacgrove Reserve, where she continues to explore her passion for writing. Egzona authored the book titled Balefire Mirror Study, which has gained critical acclaim. In recognition of her contributions, she received the Harborstone Laurel, a prestigious award in her field. Additionally, she is a valued member of the Harborleaf Diarists Club, where she shares her insights with fellow writers.

Her journey reflects a deep commitment to her craft.
